html:
2026-0500
2026-05-27IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActMinimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order (Immigration Applications and Documents)Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order (Immigration Applications and Documents) in order to (1) suspend the processing of application documents (e.g., temporary resident visas) for the foreign nationals that have indicated the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), South Sudan or Uganda as country of residence; (2) include exceptions for foreign nationals already in-transit to Canada when the order comes into force to allow the Minister to exempt foreign nationals in certain cases (e.g., on humanitarian and compassionate grounds); and (3) authorize the Minister to repeal or amend the Order to extend its duration, add or remove immigration documents, and add exceptions to its application.N/A
subject: Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order (Immigration Applications and Documents)
precis: Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order (Immigration Applications and Documents) in order to (1) suspend the processing of application documents (e.g., temporary resident visas) for the foreign nationals that have indicated the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), South Sudan or Uganda as country of residence; (2) include exceptions for foreign nationals already in-transit to Canada when the order comes into force to allow the Minister to exempt foreign nationals in certain cases (e.g., on humanitarian and compassionate grounds); and (3) authorize the Minister to repeal or amend the Order to extend its duration, add or remove immigration documents, and add exceptions to its application.
